arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham shortlist Premier League manager to replace Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: Tottenham suffered another disappointing defeat against AZ Alkmaar in the Europa League. It continued their disastrous season under manager Ange Postecoglou who has received criticism from the fans and the media for his team’s poor showing this season. arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Bournemouth LIVE: Premier League team news and line-ups as Spurs look to strike back
arts.sum: Tottenham bid to bounce back from their Europa League defeat against rested Bournemouth

arts.ttl: Analysis: Improved defending gives Spurs platform to climb the table
arts.sum: Spurs now face a Bournemouth team who rank third in the league for Expected Goals (xG) this season, so they may well be reliant on their fit-again 'keeper making more telling contributions. On the back of four consecutive Premier League defeats, the pressure was on for Postecoglou and his players at the start of February, but they discovered newfound defensive resolve in a 2-0 win at Brentford .

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Bournemouth – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur host Bournemouth in the Premier League this afternoon. Ange Postecoglou’s side crashed to their 18th defeat of the season in all competitions at AZ Alkmaar on Thursday night. arts.sum: Tottenham welcome a Bournemouth side with ambitions for European qualification to North London this afternoon. Spurs have work to do on Thursday night after losing 1-0 in the first leg of their Europa League last-16 tie with AZ Alkmaar. arts.ttl: Djed Spence makes clear Ange Postecoglou statement as Tottenham boss faces crucial week
arts.sum: Tottenham escaped with a 1-0 deficit to take into the second leg in north London next week but Spence believes that not only will they turn it around but that the players are firmly behind Postecoglou. Djed Spence has made it clear that the Tottenham players are firmly behind Ange Postecoglou and believe in what he wants them to do.
